reference: Hi, I have had upper arm pain for a few weeks now and it seems to be getting worse. I do not have pain all the time; I can carry things without pain, but I cannot raise my arm fully. I cannot put my arm behind my back; if I do, I get a sharp pain through my arm that lasts possibly about a minute. I cannot sleep properly because of the pain in my arm, and I cannot lie on that side.
text: Hi, I have had upper arm pain for a few weeks now, and it seems to be getting worse. I do not have pain all the time. I can carry things without pain, but I cannot raise my arm fully. I cannot put my arm behind my back. If I do, I get a sharp pain through my arm that lasts possibly about a minute. I cannot sleep properly because of the pain in my arm, and I cannot lie on that side.
